name: Heloises Flavored Coffee Mixes
recipeInstructions:
ORANGE:
To make 1 cup of flavored orange coffee, mix 2 rounded teaspoons of the orange coffee mix into a cup and fill with hot water.
MOCHA:
To make 1 cup of flavored mocha coffee, mix 2 rounded teaspoons of the mocha coffee mix into a cup and fill with hot water.
CINNAMON:
To make 1 cup of flavored cinnamon coffee, mix 2 rounded teaspoons of the cinnamon coffee mix into a cup and fill with hot water.
